justification.personality: The film accurately captures his severe, unsmiling, and formal demeanor as seen in the books.
justification.narrative_role: His role as a minor, background official figure at the World Cup is maintained.
justification.motivations: His primary motivation—maintaining professional decorum and authority—is consistent.
justification.character_arc: Since he is a minor, background character whose function is purely observational, his arc is perfectly preserved (i.e., he remains static and formal).

comparative.key_observations: As a minor, background character whose primary function is visual establishment of the wizarding world's bureaucracy, the film adaptation is highly faithful.
